title: mikania neei
intro: Mikania neei, also known as "Climbing Hemp Vine", is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Mikania neei can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile natural remedy for various ailments.
